title: The Rainbow
description: An enchanting theatre performance for children 1-4 years old by Black Cat Theatre. The shows primarily use live music, dance, and mime with minimal spoken language to appeal to imagination and creativity, making them accessible to children from diverse backgrounds. Children are also invited to play in the foyer and theatre hall before and after the performance.
newsletter_description: Experience 'The Rainbow', an enchanting and accessible toddler theatre performance by Black Cat Theatre. Featuring live music, dance, and mime with minimal spoken language, it's designed to spark imagination and creativity for children from all backgrounds. Children are encouraged to play before and after the show.

title: The National Potato Week
description: The No Waste Army launches 'The National Potato Week' from April 17th to 26th to rescue over 500 million kilograms of potatoes from being wasted in the Netherlands. Due to a record harvest, a massive surplus of perfectly edible potatoes is at risk of being discarded. The initiative calls on everyone to participate by ordering and picking up potatoes directly from farmers or donating them to food banks. Join the community effort to save this mountain of potatoes.
newsletter_description: The No Waste Army is hosting 'The National Potato Week' from April 17th to 26th, calling on everyone to help rescue 500 million kilograms of perfectly edible potatoes from going to waste. This initiative encourages participants to order and pick up potatoes directly from farmers or donate them to food banks, making it a great family activity to join in the fight against food waste.

title: Public Splash Pools
description: Amsterdam has 15 public toddler pools that are open seasonally from May through September. The pools operate daily from 10:00 to 18:00, provided the weather is sunny and above 20 degrees Celsius. The Municipality of Amsterdam ensures daily cleaning of these pools. Some locations, such as those in Oosterpark and Vondelpark, also offer toilet facilities, which are maintained when the pools are open. The pool at Beatrixpark opens on September 1st, while others like Oosterpark and Vondelpark are available by May 20th.
newsletter_description: Enjoy a refreshing dip at one of Amsterdam's 15 public toddler pools, hosted by the Municipality of Amsterdam. These free pools are open daily from May to September, between 10:00 and 18:00, when the temperature is 20+ degrees. Heads up: The Vondelpark and Oosterpark pools aren't open until 20 May!

title: MamaSocial Signature Brunch
description: Celebrate Dutch Mother's Day at the MamaSocial Signature Brunch at Kanarie Club in Amsterdam West. Enjoy brunch, drinks, and great chats with other mamas. The venue offers plenty of room for little ones and strollers, with nannies from Charly Cares providing supervision in a dedicated play area for babies to stretch and roll around. The event features a speaker, Fayette from Mama Thrive, discussing 'Postpartum is a time of recovery and rebuilding'. Tickets include a mimosa or juice on arrival, a personal brunch platter (raspberry chia pudding, avocado toast, smoothie of the day, fries), and your choice of one additional drink. Photographer Sim Sawyers will be capturing moments. Open to all mamas, whether with a baby, toddler, or bump.
newsletter_description: MamaSocial invites all mothers to their Signature Brunch at Kanarie Club in Amsterdam West to celebrate Dutch Mother's Day. This ticketed event offers a delicious brunch, drinks, and a chance to connect with other mamas, with nannies from Charly Cares on hand in a dedicated play area for babies and toddlers (0-3 years). A speaker will discuss postpartum recovery, providing a supportive and engaging environment for parents.

title: Freedom Brunch
description: Kiem Amsterdam invites you to their Freedom Brunch, celebrating Freedom Day with neighbors. The event features live music by singer-songwriter Sonny, is free of charge, and open to all ages. It will be held outdoors in the Wachterliedplantsoen if the weather is good, or indoors at Kiem Lokaal otherwise.
newsletter_description: Celebrate Freedom Day with Kiem Amsterdam at their free Freedom Brunch, featuring live music by singer-songwriter Sonny! This community event is open to all ages and offers a wonderful opportunity to connect with your neighbors.

title: Special Mums & Bubs with a Live Singer
description: Join Damoves for a beautiful end-of-the-year 'Special Mums & Bubs' session with a live singer. This gentle yet energizing class is created especially for mums and their little ones, offering a space to move your body, reconnect with yourself, and share a special moment with your bub. Whether you're easing back into movement or looking for a feel-good way to spend time with other mums, this session is the perfect way to close the year feeling relaxed, strong, and connected. Spots are limited, book now.
newsletter_description: Join Damoves for a beautiful end-of-the-year 'Special Mums & Bubs' session with a live singer. This gentle yet energizing class is created especially for mums and their little ones, offering a space to move your body, reconnect with yourself, and share a special moment with your bub. Whether you're easing back into movement or looking for a feel-good way to spend time with other mums, this session is the perfect way to close the year feeling relaxed, strong, and connected. Spots are limited, book now.

title: Mirror floors at the Museum of the Canals
description: The Canal Museum featuring a unique mirrored floor installation. The floor of the "Andriessenkamer" will be temporarily covered with mirrors, reflecting the 17th-century room's ornate walls and ceiling to create an immersive visual illusion.
newsletter_description: The Museum of the Canals is opening up their unique mirrored floor installation this January. The Andriessenkamer is transformed into an immersive visual illusion that reflects the room's 17th-century ornate walls and ceiling. Even beyond the installation, it's an excellent museum to visit in the center — my toddler loves it!

title: Amstermam Café
description: The Amstermam Café is open for a cozy New Year's gathering. Come with or without your baby, your CP group (even if you haven't given birth yet), or your neighbor to toast to the new year. Enjoy mocktails by Niken, cappuccinos, and tasty treats. Hosted by Amstermam.
newsletter_description: The Amstermam Café invites expectant and new parents with their babies (or without!) to a cozy New Year's gathering. Connect with other parents, enjoy mocktails, cappuccinos, and tasty treats, all hosted by Amstermam. Free to attend.

title: Kids Yoga Free Trial Special
description: Join Mukha Kids Yoga for a free trial this January. These gentle, playful yoga classes are designed to help children slow down and connect with themselves. The trial is applicable to new yogis only and requires a special code ('FREECLASS26') for registration. Classes are suitable for children 1.5-6 years old and run every Friday and Sunday throughout the month.
newsletter_description: Mukha Kids Yoga invites new yogis aged 1.5-6 years to enjoy a free trial class this January! These gentle and playful yoga sessions are designed to help children connect and slow down. Free, but registration with the code 'FREECLASS26' is required for new participants, with classes offered weekly on Fridays and Sundays.

title: Daily Playtime & Coffee at Club Abbey
description: Club Abbey reopens its doors on January 5, 2026, at 9:00 AM, welcoming families to start the new year. Parents can enjoy much-needed coffee and delicious snacks while their little ones aged 1 to 6 years play in a dedicated area. The entrance fee for children is €5.50.
newsletter_description: Club Abbey, a beloved indoor play cafe for children aged 1-6 years, reopens on January 5th for daily fun. Parents can enjoy coffee and snacks while their little ones explore the play area. Entrance is only €5.50 in the morning!

title: Toddler & Parent Dance & Drama Class
description: A fun, engaging and interactive dance and drama class for toddlers and their parents/carers, held weekly on Fridays in Oud West on the Overtoom. It is an opportunity to discover movement and drama in a safe and welcoming environment. Classes include storytelling, action songs, music, games and lots of opportunities to get creative and silly together.
newsletter_description: This engaging and interactive drama and dance class is designed for children aged 2-4 years and their parents. It features storytelling, music, and games to encourage creative movement in a welcoming, LGBTQ+ friendly environment. You can sign up for a whole term at a discount, or check their website to attend a drop-in class. Comes recommended by multiple local parents!

title: Parent & Child Yoga 1,5-2,5 years EAST
description:
This 30-minute class is a wonderful introduction to movement, breath, and yoga. The class includes many fixed elements. This helps them gradually understand what a class is and build confidence through recognition.

We create a safe space where your child can connect with others and develop self-confidence – all while having lots of fun. We practice moments of rest and encourage your child to explore.

After class there are 15 more minutes to play and connect with our parents and children (optional).
newsletter_description: Mukha Kids Yoga's class includes many fixed elements, which helps the little ones gradually understand what a class is and build confidence through recognition. It finishes with optional play and connection for children and parents alike.

title: Parent & Child Yoga 2,5-4 years EAST
description:
Parent & Child Yoga 2,5-4 years (from walking comfortably)
This 45-minute class is playful and full of movement, dance, and yoga. We focus on developing your child’s motor skills. Together, we support each other as we climb, crawl, and even fly!
The class has a fixed beginning and ending. Each week, we explore a new theme that connects to the children’s world, such as the seasons, the forest, or the sea. We also pay attention to breathing awareness.
newsletter_description: Mukha Kids Yoga's older toddler class has a fixed beginning and ending and explores a new theme that connects to the children’s world, such as the seasons, the forest, or the sea. Great for parents and kids alike to connect and play through yoga practice.

title: Montessori-Inspired Toddler Playgroup
description: Join Coffee & Kids for a Montessori-inspired toddler playgroup where little ones can learn through play. The sessions offer fun activities designed to build confidence, independence, and social skills.
newsletter_description: Coffee & Kids hosts a weekly Montessori-inspired toddler playgroup where little ones can learn through play. These fun activities are designed to build confidence, independence, and social skills for toddlers aged 1-4 years.

title: Parent & Child Yoga 2-4 years NORTH
description:
Parent & Child Yoga 2,5-4 years (from walking comfortably)
This 45-minute class is playful and full of movement, dance, and yoga. We focus on developing your child’s motor skills. Together, we support each other as we climb, crawl, and even fly!
The class has a fixed beginning and ending. Each week, we explore a new theme that connects to the children’s world, such as the seasons, the forest, or the sea. We also pay attention to breathing awareness.
newsletter_description: Mukha Kids Yoga's older toddler class has a fixed beginning and ending and explores a new theme that connects to the children’s world, such as the seasons, the forest, or the sea. Great for parents and kids alike to connect and play through yoga practice.

title: Run yourself silly!
description: Experience 'Ren je Rot!', a session filled with climbing fun for toddlers and their parents at the Wachterliedpaviljoen. Led by Gyselle Freitas, a professional circus artist and experienced teacher, this event encourages movement, expression, and playful learning. Gyselle, with over 20 years of experience, invites you and your child to explore, roll, laugh, and discover together. This event is free and primarily aimed at parents and children residing in the Bos en Lommer area. As Gyselle says, 'Movement is a language everyone speaks,' come and discover how you and your child can playfully grow in confidence, strength, and joy!
newsletter_description: It's a free, drop-in movement and play session hosted by professional circus artist Gyselle Freitas, for children up to 4 years and their parents.

title: Understanding Baby Sleep Workshop
description: This free interactive workshop from Lara's Little Dreamers helps parents understand changes in their baby's sleep for babies 4 - 12 months old. It covers 'My Little House of Sleep', exploring what babies are going through, how it affects sleep, and strategies to improve sleep without traditional sleep training, respecting individual parenting styles. The workshop will be live, with a limited-time recording available for signed-up participants.
newsletter_description: Join Lara's Little Dreamers for a free online workshop to understand baby sleep for parents of 4-12 month olds. This interactive session provides strategies to improve your baby's sleep, focusing on understanding their development rather than sleep training, all while respecting your unique parenting style.

title: Playdate Morning
description: A Playdate Morning for moms and kids (0-4 yrs) hosted at the new second location of WOW Family Center in De Rivierenbuurt. This session, priced at €10, is designed as a gentle meeting point for moms to connect and share, and for little ones to play. It includes 1 drink and 1 free play for one child. Bookable via the Classitter app.
newsletter_description: A gentle meeting point for moms to connect and for little ones to play. It includes 1 drink and 1 free play for one child.

title: Music Class for Babies and Toddlers with Hanna Matthijssen
description: Hanna Matthijssen offers a fantastic music class for babies and toddlers (1-3 years old) at Belcampo Cafe, located inside the OBA. This engaging class, highly praised by parents, runs weekly on Thursdays from 9:30 to 10:30. Trial classes are available, and there are still some spots left. Children love Hanna and her songs, often singing them long after the class!
newsletter_description: Join Hanna Matthijssen for an amazing weekly music class designed for babies and toddlers aged 1-3 years. Held at Belcampo Cafe, this class offers engaging songs and activities that children adore, with trial classes available. It's a fantastic way to introduce little ones to the joy of music and connect with other parents.

title: Ballet at WOW Family Center
description:
Drop-in ballet classes for children aged 2-5 years, taught by instructor Derin. 

In WOW Family Center's ballet classes for kids, little dancers are introduced to the art of ballet in a fun and engaging way. Through creative movement exercises, basic positions, and simple choreography, children build balance, coordination, and confidence while nurturing their love for dance.
newsletter_description: In WOW Family Center's weekly drop-in ballet classes for kids, little dancers are introduced to the art of ballet in a fun and engaging way. They build balance, coordination, and confidence while nurturing their love for dance.

title: Tulip Day Amsterdam 2026
description: Celebrate the start of the 2026 tulip season. At 1:00 PM, a massive garden featuring 200,000 tulips will open to the public, where everyone is invited to pick a free bouquet. Under the 2026 theme "United in Bloom!"
newsletter_description: Celebrate the start of the 2026 tulip season at Museumplein, where a massive garden featuring 200,000 tulips will open to the public. Everyone is invited to pick a free bouquet, celebrating under the theme "United in Bloom!". This free event is open to all ages.

title: Life. Stories: Reading, Music, and Wonder
description: Join us for a unique storytime event where @cocosabajo will read from 'Een heel bijzondere bloem'. This experience goes beyond just reading, focusing on themes of self-discovery, recognizing feelings, and curiosity about others. Children are encouraged to discover, play, and share, not just sit and listen. The event includes a creative workshop and beautiful music by @norberthoven, along with snacks and drinks for the kids. Parents can enjoy coffee and chat with friends. Entry is free, but spots are limited, so registration is required via the link in bio.
newsletter_description: Enjoy a special storytime, creative workshop with music, and activities designed to encourage self-discovery, play, and sharing. Complete with snacks for kids and coffee for parents.

title: Parents workshop: Managing Big Emotions
description: This session by Monti’s World is designed to equip parents with the knowledge and tools to better understand and support their child's emotional awareness and development, specifically for children aged 0-5. It focuses on a nurturing approach to supporting big emotions like anger and frustration, gaining insight into children's developing brains, and exploring effective parental response strategies. The session, led by Dr Faye Poole, an Educational and Child Psychologist, helps parents connect with their child and respond with confidence during challenging times. The cost is €40,00.
newsletter_description: Educational and Child Psychologist Dr Faye Poole provides tools and insights into children's emotional development and effective parenting strategies to navigate challenging times. For parents of children aged 0-5.

title: Cinemini: Film and Play for Kids
description: Every Sunday morning, Eye Filmmuseum's intimate film theatre presents outstanding short films and animations, often from its rich collection, for children aged 2 to 6 and their parents/grandparents. After the screening, kids are invited to explore light and shadow in play tents and on a large lightbox, specially designed by Taartrovers. Children can experiment with how light creates shadow images, how they disappear, become larger or smaller, or take on different shapes, inspiring their own stories. Cinemini is regularly sold out, so it is advised to buy tickets online in advance. During school holidays, special sessions with a Dutch Sign Language interpreter are available.
newsletter_description: Dive into the magic of cinema every Sunday morning at Eye Filmmuseum with Cinemini! This recurring event features outstanding short films and animations for children aged 2-6, followed by interactive play with light and shadow in specially designed tents. Tickets are required and can be purchased online in advance to ensure your spot.

title: Ballet with Me
description: Ballet met Mij is an introductory dance class hosted by Balletschool De Kattensprong, designed for children aged 1-4 years (or capable of walking) and their parents/guardians. The class focuses on listening to and moving on music, feeling and using body parts, and telling stories with expressive movements, laying a broad basic technique for all dance styles, including classical ballet. Through themes and stories, dance steps are introduced, fostering fun, cooperation, self-confidence, concentration, discipline, group formation, coordination, and vocabulary. Parents/guardians are required to participate in the class.
newsletter_description: Dance with your little ones in this weekly class exploring movement, storytelling, and basic ballet techniques. For babies who have started walking, up to 4 years old.

title: Mothering in the City
description: Come join free textile art workshops to share what it is like to be a mother in the city. The workshops are for mothers with a migration background, who have a child under 6, and live in IJburg. Together with Warmi Küyen, a Latin American textile group, participants will create arpilleras (hand-stitched artworks) to share their stories and experiences of everyday mothering. All materials for artwork, lunch, tea, and coffee are provided. Babysitting for children can be arranged, and financial compensation is available if needed. At the end of the project, a group exhibition will be hosted, and participants can take their artwork home. This project is part of a research by the Department of Human Geography and Spatial Planning at Utrecht University.
newsletter_description: Join 'Mothering in the City', a series of free textile art workshops hosted by Utrecht University in collaboration with Warmi Küyen, specifically for mothers with a migration background living in IJburg and with children under 6 years old. Participants will create unique hand-stitched artworks to share their experiences of everyday mothering, with all materials, food, and optional babysitting provided.

title: My colors
description: In 'My Little Rabbit', mother Rabbit and her small Rabbit embark on various adventures. The small Rabbit (a puppet, initially white and little) gains a new color with each adventure and grows. In one scene, Rabbit's arm turns yellow; in another, its leg turns green. When Rabbit is grown, he doesn't understand where the colors came from. By looking back at photos, Rabbit learns more about himself. Parents and children experience a lot together in the first three years; children may remember little of this later, but it shapes who they are. 'My Little Rabbit' is a solo performance where Anastasiia continues her animation technique from her successful show 'Thuis', even painting live animation. With music and sound design by Thijs Felperlaan, it will be a colorful and imaginative performance designed to make children aware of their own growth and identity. Registration is not required. Make sure to arrive on time to not miss any part of the performance!
newsletter_description: Join the OBA for 'Mijn Kleuren,' a captivating family performance for ages 2+. This free puppet show, featuring live animation and music, explores a little rabbit's journey of growth and identity, encouraging children to reflect on their own development.

title: Family tour at the Rijksmuseum
description: A guided tour of the Rijksmuseum specifically designed for parents of babies and toddlers (0-4 years old). This specially-crafted 1-hour tour is led by Amsterdam Parent Project and Paola Bucciol, author of the ABCs of Amsterdam and an official Rijksmuseum tour guide. Meet fellow local parents and learn about the museum's most famous pieces, including those by Rembrandt and Vermeer, in the Gallery of Honor. The tour is flexible to meet your family's needs, allowing you to step out to feed or change your baby. After the tour, there's an opportunity to connect with the group at the museum cafe. Please note: The fee covers the guided tour; museum entrance must be paid separately via Museumkaart or a purchased ticket.
newsletter_description: Explore the Rijksmuseum with your little ones (0-4 years old) on this specially designed flexible family tour by APP and official Rijksmuseum tour guide Paola Bucciol. Discover famous artworks like those by Rembrandt and Vermeer while meeting other local parents with young children. First time we're offering this outside of our Fourth Trimester Program!

title: Free Clothing Market: Winter Edition
description: West Kleedt Aan is hosting its Winter Edition free clothing market. Discover pre-loved clothes and promote sustainability in a cozy winter atmosphere. The event takes place at MidWest, Cabralstraat 1, Amsterdam.
newsletter_description: Join West Kleedt Aan for their Winter Edition free clothing market! This community event at MidWest encourages sustainability and offers pre-loved clothes for all ages. It's a fantastic opportunity for families to find new treasures, and it's completely free!

title: Kindertaalcafé – Knuffeldag edition
description: The Kindertaalcafé is a bilingual and multicultural event hosted by Taalhuis Amsterdam, designed to welcome families and young language enthusiasts. This 'Knuffeldag edition' (Hugging Day) is dedicated to hugging and stuffed toys, featuring themed story readings in Dutch, Greek, Italian, Bulgarian, and Turkish. There's a children's book reading carousel and a fun, creative workshop for children, accompanied by coffee, tea, and croissants. A cozy lunch buffet is available from 12:00. Parents can also attend a 20-minute session by Maria Potvin from Growing Up Multilingual on raising children multilingually. Participants are encouraged to bring their favorite stuffed animal and books in their own language. It's a free event, fostering play, reading, exploration, and connection within Amsterdam’s multicultural community.
newsletter_description: Enjoy multilingual storytime with a focus on 'knuffels' (stuffed toys), a creative workshop for children, and a special session for parents on raising multilingual children. Bring your favorite stuffed animal and connect with Amsterdam's diverse community over coffee, croissants, and a delicious lunch buffet.

title: Family jazz concert with Tcha Limberger
description: Experience an afternoon full of music and stories for all ages, led by jazz manouche violinist Tcha Limberger at BIMHUIS Amsterdam. Part of the Django Amsterdam festival, young listeners will be introduced to the jazz manouche style of Django Reinhardt. Tcha Limberger performs with vocals, violin, and guitar, sharing captivating anecdotes from his extensive musical career. His diverse repertoire includes works by Django and other Manouche and Sinti artists, alongside Hungarian, Romanian, Transylvanian, Serbian, and Greek songs. Tickets are €17, with reduction prices available.
newsletter_description: A captivating family concert at BIMHUIS with jazz manouche violinist Tcha Limberger, suitable for all ages. This special afternoon, part of Django Amsterdam, will introduce young listeners to the vibrant world of Django Reinhardt's music, filled with stories and diverse sounds.
location: Piet Heinkade 3, 1019 BR Amsterdam, The Netherlands

title: The Big Early Dark Winter Festival at Jeugdland
description: Celebrate winter at Jeugdland's 'Big Early Dark Winter Festival.' This free event offers a cozy and fun atmosphere both indoors and outdoors. Activities include a children's disco to combat the winter blues, building a hut palace, shadow theater, and a cloth labyrinth, listening to winter stories by the open fireplace, making beeswax candles and night butterflies, helping to construct a willow tunnel, and an obstacle course. Come and celebrate winter with us!
newsletter_description: Jeugdland Amsterdam is hosting their free 'Big Early Dark Winter Festival,' a festive event on January 25th, 2026, offering diverse indoor and outdoor activities for all ages. Families can enjoy a children's disco, get creative making beeswax candles and night butterflies, build a hut palace, listen to winter stories, or tackle an obstacle course.

title: Nijntje Gymnastics
description: Toddler Gymnastics Nijntje (Peuterturnen Nijntje) is a program designed for children aged 2 to 4 years, where they learn to move in a playful and engaging way under the guidance of a parent or guardian. The program follows the official Nijntje (Miffy) 'beweegdiploma' method, which focuses on developing fundamental motor skills. Each lesson lasts 45 minutes. Turnz Amsterdam Gymnastics offers a free trial lesson for new participants, with regular participation typically requiring a membership.
newsletter_description: Turnz Amsterdam Gymnastics hosts a weekly program to help toddlers alongside their parents develop fundamental motor skills using all fun of Nijntje. You can try a free trial class, and they host additional Saturday classes on Zeeburgereiland, too.

title: Kleine Aap by Katiuscia Principato
description: ''Kleine Aap'' is an intimate, colorful, and musical theatre performance by Katiuscia Principato, designed for children aged two and up. Based on the Picture Book of the Year 2026 by Mies van Hout, this interactive show encourages children to move and react, providing a warm and accessible first theatre experience. The performance lasts 35 minutes and is specially created for the National Reading Days. Please note that booking fees apply.
newsletter_description: This interactive music theatre performance by Katiuscia Principato is based on the "Kleine Aap" Picture Book of the Year 2026. It's only 35 minutes and little ones can move and react — a good first theater experience.
location: Meer en Vaart 300, 1068 LE Amsterdam, The Netherlands

title: EXTRA story time met Charlene
description: Charlene, with her background in theatre and education, will host an extra story time session at De Kinderboekwinkel during the Nationale Voorleesdagen. She makes every reading morning a party, complete with songs. It's a great opportunity for toddlers and their parents to immerse themselves in the Dutch language and meet other parents.
newsletter_description: Join Charlene for an extra special story time at De Kinderboekwinkel during Nationale Voorleesdagen. With her background in theatre and education, Charlene makes every session a party, complete with songs, offering a wonderful opportunity for toddlers aged 1-4 years and their parents to enjoy Dutch language immersion and connect with other families. Tickets are required.

title: A Vision Board Gathering for Asian Moms
description: The Second Steep is hosting an online vision board gathering for Asian moms. This event encourages participants to pause, reflect, and bring forward what aligns with their creativity and purpose for the Year of the Horse (2026). Participants can choose their preferred media, such as paper, markers, Canva, or Google Sheets, to visualize their goals. Registration is required, with details available via the link in their bio.
newsletter_description: The Second Steep invites Asian mothers to an online vision board gathering designed for reflection and creativity. This event helps moms visualize their intentions for 2026, offering a unique opportunity to connect with purpose and community. For adults (mothers), registration is required.

title: A musical party with little monkey and her friends
description: The event is based on 'Little Monkey', this year's picture book. Little Monkey has big news to share, and children are invited to a participatory performance where they can dance, sing, and make music with Little Monkey and his friends from the big forest. The event is free, but registration is required via osdorp@oba.nl.
newsletter_description: Join OBA Osdorp for 'A musical party with little monkey and her friends', a participatory performance based on this year's picture book 'Little Monkey'. Children aged 2 and up can dance, sing, and make music with the characters. This free event requires registration.

title: Masterclass Birth Team Clarity: Who Supports You & When It Matters Most
description: This Masterclass provides clear, honest insight into how the Dutch maternity system actually works, clarifying who supports you, when, and how – during pregnancy, birth, transfers of care, and postpartum. It's designed to help parents-to-be feel more grounded, informed, and confident about their support system. The event is hosted live on Zoom and registration is required.
organization: Birthnest Doula and Raising The Village
newsletter_description: Join Birthnest Doula and Raising The Village for a crucial online Masterclass on 'Birth Team Clarity.' This session provides clear, honest insights into who supports you and how the Dutch maternity system works during pregnancy, birth, and postpartum, helping parents-to-be feel more grounded and confident. This online event is perfect for pregnant individuals, those trying to conceive, or anyone supporting them.

title: Growing Happy Bellies Pop-up & Baby Play Date - Friday
description: Join Growing Happy Bellies for a pop-up and baby play date where little ones can explore and try GHB snacks. Parents can connect with each other and take home pre-frozen meals for their children. It's a low-pressure, fun event, and you can also drop by just to pick up snacks and meals. Location and time will be shared in the WhatsApp group after commenting 'play date' to join.
newsletter_description: There's a new mom-owned baby & toddler meal business starting in West! Growing Happy Bellies is hosting a pop-up play date where little ones can explore and taste snacks. Parents will have the opportunity to connect and take home pre-frozen meals.

title: Amsterdam Tea Festival 2026
description: The Amsterdam Tea Festival 2026 offers a vibrant celebration of tea culture. The main festival, held at Het Sieraad from 11:00 to 19:00, features mini tastings, live music, performances, 100 tea and teaware vendors, and creative showcases. For an evening experience, the Tea Rave at Warehouse H7 from 21:00 to 03:00 (the following day) provides DJs, a dancefloor, and cozy tea corners for a sober night out. A variety of ticket options are available, including early bird, full day, and VIP passes. Workshops and exhibitor tastings can be booked separately, with an exclusive Sergey Shevelev Rare Aged Teas Tasting included in the Tea Lover Ticket. Children under 12 are welcome and can attend for free with a reserved child ticket.
newsletter_description: Immerse yourself in the world of tea at the Amsterdam Tea Festival 2026, featuring live music and tastings -- including herbal options for the little ones! -- from over 100 tea vendors. This family-friendly event also includes a unique Tea Rave for late-night fun. Children under 12 attend for free, but do keep in mind that there will be fragile ceramics to contend with.

title: Growing Happy Bellies Pop-up & Baby Play Date - Saturday
description: Join Growing Happy Bellies for a pop-up and baby play date where little ones can explore and try GHB snacks. Parents can connect with each other and take home pre-frozen meals for their children. It's a low-pressure, fun event, and you can also drop by just to pick up snacks and meals. Location and time will be shared in the WhatsApp group after commenting 'play date' to join.
newsletter_description: There's a new mom-owned baby & toddler meal business starting in West! Growing Happy Bellies is hosting a pop-up play date where little ones can explore and taste snacks. Parents will have the opportunity to connect and take home pre-frozen meals.

title: A Musical Party with Little Monkey and Her Friends
description: This interactive performance, based on 'Little Monkey,' this year's picture book, invites children to dance, sing, and make music with Little Monkey and all the animals living in the big forest. Little Monkey has big news to share, and children can help him tell it! To participate, please register via javaplein@oba.nl.
newsletter_description: Join OBA for 'A Musical Party with Little Monkey and Her Friends,' an interactive performance where children aged 2+ can dance, sing, and make music. Based on 'Little Monkey,' this year's picture book, the event invites kids to engage with forest animals and the little monkey himself. Registration is required via javaplein@oba.nl.

title: The ABCs of Raising Multilingual Children
description: A workshop hosted by Growing Up Multilingual at Monti's World, focusing on the science, strategies, and soul for raising multilingual children with confidence. Designed for families navigating multiple languages, cultures, and countries, it offers clarity and connection for parents, helping them move beyond guesswork to confident parenting.
newsletter_description: Join Growing Up Multilingual for a workshop on 'The ABCs of Raising Multilingual Children.' This session provides science, strategies, and soul for families navigating the journey of raising multilingual children with confidence. Geared towards parents of all ages, it offers clarity and connection in their parenting approach.

title: Baby, Toddler & Carer Yoga for Little Ones & All Carers
description:
All levels of experience welcome. Babies & toddlers in a carrier are welcome.

This informal class allows any carer the chance to bond with their little one, whilst getting some movement. The atmosphere is very relaxed - feel free to feed or nurse, or to change a nappy or take a pause any time you need.

Babies and toddlers that can already crawl or walk must be safely contained in a carrier or buggy. You must have a baby or toddler with you to attend this class. No more than two infants per adult. Couples are welcome to attend together!

Cancellation
Free credit available up to 3 hours before
newsletter_description: Babies, toddlers, and their carers are invited to a special yoga class designed for bonding and well-being. This session focuses on gentle movements and relaxation, providing a nurturing environment for both little ones and their caregivers. Couples are especially encouraged to attend!

title: Sneeuwwitje
description: Experience the timeless fairytale of Snow White (Sneeuwwitje) at Theater De Krakeling. The performance on Sunday, February 8th at 14:30 offers a special 'Prikkelarme' (sensory-friendly) reception, organized by De Krakeling in collaboration with Stichting Onbeperkt Genieten / De Prikkelarme Cultuuragenda. This reception is designed to provide a more comfortable environment for visitors with sensory sensitivities, though the play itself remains unchanged and open to all.
newsletter_description: De Krakeling's upcoming performance of Snow White is a special one; they've collaborated with Stichting Onbeperkt Genieten to create an accompanying reception designed for audiences with sensory sensitivities 🫶🏻 For children 3+.

title: Tumble & Tea
description: Join The Little Gym Amsterdam for their Tumble & Tea classes, a 45-minute session designed for fun and movement. These classes are perfect for babies and toddlers aged 4 to 36 months, happening during the spring break.
newsletter_description: Come along to The Little Gym Amsterdam for their Tumble & Tea classes, a 45-minute session filled with fun and movement. Specifically designed for babies and toddlers aged 4 to 36 months, these classes offer a great activity during spring break.

title: Navigating Change: How to Find Your Flow with Mindfulness & Freewriting
description: This interactive online workshop, led by career empowerment coach Paola Brignoli and creative writer Ilaria Mangiardi, helps participants embrace the inevitability of change. It offers practical tools rooted in mindfulness and freewriting to navigate transitions with clarity and confidence. Explore the psychology of change, reframe challenges, and build adaptability through self-reflection and creative exercises. The session aims to foster a grounded and curious mindset, empowering individuals to move forward with hope and a deeper connection to their creative flow.
newsletter_description: Join career empowerment coach Paola Brignoli and creative writer Ilaria Mangiardi for an online workshop on navigating change with mindfulness and freewriting. This paid session helps adults embrace transitions with clarity and confidence, offering practical tools for self-reflection and adaptability.

title: Warm Children's Clothing Donation Day
description: Do you have winter clothing that no longer fits your children? Sharing with Kids, in collaboration with Quinnie’s, is organizing a donation day to collect warm children's clothing. Your pre-loved items will find a good home and help make many children happy. Please check the original Instagram post for details on what specific items can be accepted for donation.
newsletter_description: Sharing with Kids and Quinnie's are teaming up to host a Warm Children's Clothing Donation Day. Families are invited to donate outgrown winter clothes at Quinnie's Amsterdam, helping to make many children happy by providing them with warm apparel. This event is for parents/guardians to drop off donations, benefiting children of all ages.

title: Valentine's Gift-Making Workshop
description: The Parent-Baby workshop is a special moment for parents to connect with their baby through touch, exchange, and mutual observation. Participants will learn massage techniques, babywearing, awakening games, and non-verbal communication that promote the child's development and strengthen the attachment bond. Each session is led by an early childhood professional who will guide parents and answer questions in a caring and intimate setting. This workshop offers the opportunity to share quality time, meet other parents, and create precious memories. The event costs €25.00.
newsletter_description: Join Papote for a Valentine's Gift-making Workshop, where you'll be decorating a Tote Bag alongside your little one. You also get a drink included per ticket.
location: 65 Vasco da Gamastraat De Baarsjes  1057 VJ Amsterdam

title: Fourth Trimester Meetup
description: An informal meetup for expecting and newborn parents (0-3 months postpartum) in the neighborhood to chat about pregnancy and postpartum experiences. It's an opportunity to make in-person connections, discuss local experiences postpartum, and find community support.
newsletter_description: The Amsterdam Parent Project invites expecting parents and those with newborns (0-3 months) to an informal meetup. Connect offline with other families in Amsterdam West, chat about pregnancy and postpartum, and find local community support.

title: LEGO Botanicals Bloom Bar
description: Join the LEGO Botanicals Bloom Bar experience where you can unleash your creativity and build your very own custom LEGO botanical bouquet. This interactive workshop is perfect for families and involves selecting LEGO elements to craft unique floral designs. It's a hands-on activity designed to inspire creativity and provide a fun, engaging experience for all ages. Booking is required for this free event.
newsletter_description: Unleash your creativity at the LEGO Botanicals Bloom Bar, a free, interactive workshop hosted by the LEGO Store Amsterdam. Design and build your own custom LEGO botanical bouquet. Children under 9 are welcome with a parent.

title: Saturday Morning Toddler Club
description: A free club for toddlers/preschoolers (ages 2-5) and their grown-ups. We read beautiful stories by the fireplace and then go on an adventure themed after the book!
newsletter_description: The Jeugdland Amsterdam hosts a free Saturday Morning Toddler Club for children aged 2-5 years and their grown-ups. Enjoy beautiful stories read by the fireplace, followed by an adventure themed after the book, fostering early literacy and shared fun.

title: Beth & Flo Family Piano Concert at the Royal Concert Hall
description: Beth & Flo are two remarkable pianists, Elsbet Remijn and Claudette Verhulst. Cheerful and sometimes a little crazy, they race across the keys with twenty fingers at once, but also play beautifully softly and dreamily. They are very good friends, but they also argue regularly, which you can hear reflected in their piano playing during this concert. Flo enjoys imitating animal sounds on the piano, especially loud roars, while Beth loves to sing and blow bubbles. Featuring music by Saint-Saëns, Ruben Naeff, Debussy, Gershwin and others, this concert is a piano feast for everyone. The duo studied at the Royal Conservatoire in The Hague and also tour theatres with their cabaret show.
newsletter_description: Beth & Flo are two remarkable pianists, cheerful and sometimes a little crazy. Flo enjoys imitating animal sounds on the piano, especially loud roars, while Beth loves to sing and blow bubbles. A fun way to introduce your little one to the piano this Valentine's Day — and remarkably for any family concert at the Muziekgebouw, there are still tickets left!
location: Piet Heinkade 1, 1019 BR Amsterdam, The Netherlands

title: Neighborhood Pancake Express
description: Join neighborhood residents, the Tiny Buurthouse, and the mobile neighborhood terrace as they cycle through the Stadionbuurt. Meet them for pancakes, coffee, and tea, or swing along to live music from Diva Unlimited!
newsletter_description: Join neighborhood residents, the Tiny Buurthouse, and the mobile neighborhood terrace as they cycle through the Stadionbuurt this Valentine's Day. Meet them for pancakes, coffee, and tea, or swing along to live music from Diva Unlimited!

title: Umi
description: Umi (sea) is an enchanting, interactive musical experience that celebrates the origin of all life. This magical and musical dance performance takes you on a journey of wonder, where waves of sound and movement fill the space, inviting you to sing, dance, and be free. Dancers and musicians improvise with the reactions of the very young audience (babies and toddlers), creating a unique and moving dialogue. The show lasts 30 minutes, followed by 15 minutes of free play.
newsletter_description: Umi (Sea) is a magical show that celebrates the origin of life through sound and movement. It invites babies, toddlers, and their parents to sing, dance, and play alongside the artists. Perfect for ages 0.5+ years.

title: Munganga Family Carnival
description: A day full of Brazilian rhythms at the Munganga Family Carnival. Come dressed up if you like, and let's dance together with live music, confetti, lemonade, and popcorn!
newsletter_description: A morning full of vibrant Brazilian rhythms, dancing, live music, confetti, lemonade, and popcorn! It's perfect for families of all ages looking to celebrate carnival. Costumes encouraged.

title: Stivaletto Carnival Party
description: Celebrate Carnival with Lostivaletto at Buurtcentrum De Tagerijn! This family-friendly event promises an afternoon of joy, colors, and entertainment. Activities include creative workshops specifically designed for children aged 2 to 12 years, a lively Carnival parade with a prize for the 'most beautiful mask,' and a delicious buffet for all ages. It's the perfect occasion for the Italian community and beyond to come together and enjoy a festive afternoon in Amsterdam.
newsletter_description: Lostivaletto (Famiglie in italiano Amsterdam) invites you to their vibrant Carnival Party at Buurtcentrum De Tagerijn. This family-friendly event features entertainment, creative workshops for children aged 2-12, a costume parade, and a delicious buffet. Tickets are required for this festive afternoon of fun and community.
location: Buurtcentrum De Tagerijn, Balboastraat 18, 1057 VW Amsterdam, The Netherlands

title: Special Parents workshop
description: There's a free pilot training session for parents of children with special needs led by Tamara Janmaat, mother of a special needs child and certified Nonviolent Communication trainer. Drawing on her personal experience and expertise, she creates a place for recognition and understanding, and to practice difficult situations and conversations, find the right words, and learn to be more confident in your interactions with others. Contact tamara@vrijcommuniceren.nl for more info.
newsletter_description: There's a free pilot training session for parents of children with special needs led by Tamara Janmaat, mother of a special needs child and certified Nonviolent Communication trainer. Drawing on her personal experience and expertise, she creates a place for recognition and understanding, and to practice difficult situations and conversations, find the right words, and learn to be more confident in your interactions with others. Contact tamara@vrijcommuniceren.nl for more info.

title: Prenatal Yoga Monday Evenings
description: Join Krishyoga's live Prenatal Yoga Class, specifically designed to support expecting parents through every stage of pregnancy. The class is led by expert prenatal yoga and hypnobirthing teacher, Krishna Hassomal. Each week, participants explore gentle yet powerful practices to ease physical discomfort, build strength, calm the mind, and nurture their connection with their baby. The class offers safe, pregnancy-focused yoga for all trimesters, guided breathing techniques, relaxation, and a supportive space to feel empowered and connected. While primarily held in person at Tante Toorop, participants can also join online or access a recording for up to 14 days.
newsletter_description: Krishyoga invites expecting parents to their weekly Prenatal Yoga class, designed to support you through every stage of pregnancy. Led by expert teacher Krishna Hassomal, the class focuses on gentle yet powerful practices to ease discomfort, build strength, and connect with your baby. Join in person at Tante Toorop, or virtually from home.

title: Walks Playgroup
description:
We’ll be singing songs 🎶, reading books 📚, having fruits 🍇 together and time for freeplay.

📍Here is the address:
https://maps.app.goo.gl/6JWei8uEfkceUZcr8?g_st=ic
Room 7 (Level 2, there is an elevator)
⏰ Time: every Monday from 10:00 to 12:30

Would you like to join us?
If yes, bring a fruit to share and come along ☺️
Combiwel will provide tea and coffee for us.

We are currently setting us the space so gently used toys and floor mats are very welcome!
newsletter_description: Amazing initiative out of the Walks group! They set up a free weekly playgroup in De Pijp for babies, toddlers, and their parents. Enjoy singing, reading, free play, and a shared fruit time. Tea and coffee are provided for adults, and participants are encouraged to bring a fruit to share. Join the group to stay updated and to volunteer.
location: Tweede van der Helststraat 66, 1072 PG Amsterdam

title: Negenmaandenbeurs
description: The Negenmaandenbeurs is the essential event for expectant and new parents, taking place at RAI Amsterdam. Visitors can discover over 350 top brands offering trendy items for babies, toddlers, and themselves. Tickets are available starting from 10 euros.
newsletter_description: The Negenmaandenbeurs is Amsterdam's biggest baby fair, offering expectant and new parents the chance to explore over 350 top brands with trendy items for babies, toddlers, and themselves. Tickets are available from 10 euros. It's an ideal event for families with children aged 0-4 years.

title: Abrikos Russian Children's Club
description: Abrikos Children's Club offers a wide range of developmental and educational activities for children aged 2-7 years. Programs include Russian language, math, logic, art, music, and theater classes, as well as English lessons and school preparation. The club also provides speech therapy and psychology services. Classes are held weekly from Tuesday through Sunday, with the first classes on Tuesday starting at 16:30.
newsletter_description: Abrikos Children's Club offers a variety of engaging activities for children aged 2-7 years, including Russian language, math, art, and music classes, as well as English lessons. Hosted by Abrikos, these enriching programs are designed for early childhood development. It is a paid service, with classes running weekly from Tuesday to Sunday.

title: Sophrology & Pregnancy: Body & Mind Preparation Workshop for Moms-to-be
description: If you are pregnant and looking for a Maternity Preparation Course that combines body and mind, this introductory workshop is for you! It will allow you to experience the benefits of Sophrology during pregnancy: a self-development method and practice that aims at harmonizing body and mind to bring or restore general well-being and inner balance. This workshop will help you let go of tensions and stress, feel calm and confident, and get in touch and connect with your changing body and baby through breathwork, gentle movements, relaxation techniques, visualisation, and meditation.
newsletter_description: Join Delphine Ricciuti from Experience Sophro for an online Sophrology & Pregnancy workshop. This session offers body and mind preparation for moms-to-be, focusing on harmonizing wellbeing and inner balance through breathwork, relaxation, and meditation. It's designed to help future moms connect with their changing bodies and babies.

title: Blooming Balance Yoga Class - De Pjip
description:
Carol from Life in Bloom Yoga will be guiding parents through a nurturing, well-rounded all-levels yoga class that blends flow, stretch, strength, & stillness to support both body & inner life. Created for real bodies in changing seasons, this practice offers space for movement, rest, reflection, & connection just for the adults. No pressure, no judgment. We meet you exactly where you are.

Locations and Dates
- De Pijp: Monti's World on Thursdays Feb 19, 26 & Mar 5 at 10:30-11:30

Details:
- 1 hour session: 45 minutes of connecting with your own body & mind through yoga, 15 minutes of connecting with people going through this same messy adventure (tea & coffee provided)
- All levels welcome (even pregnant)
- Adults only

Practical Tips:
- Wear comfy clothes for movement
- Yoga mats & water are provided, but you are welcome to bring your own
newsletter_description: Life in Bloom Yoga offers a nurturing, all-levels yoga class for adults, including pregnant individuals, blending movement, rest, and reflection. Hosted by Carol, this paid 1-hour session includes 45 minutes of yoga and 15 minutes for connecting with other parents, with tea and coffee provided. No pressure, no judgment, all levels welcome.

title: Amsterdam Chocolate Festival
description: The ultimate festival for all chocolate lovers in Amsterdam. Explore, taste, learn, and enjoy the finest chocolate and cocoa. Discover various chocolate makers, participate in workshops, and indulge in delicious treats suitable for all ages.
newsletter_description: Indulge your sweet tooth at the Amsterdam Chocolate Festival, a delightful event for all chocolate lovers! Explore a world of flavors with tastings, participate in engaging workshops, and discover exquisite chocolate creations. This annual festival, hosted by Chocolade Festival Amsterdam, requires tickets for entry and is suitable for all ages.

title: Made in China: Makers Weekend at the World Museum
description: Experience the 'Made in China Makersweekend' at Wereldmuseum Amsterdam, a vibrant event where art, design, and craft converge. Meet Dutch-Chinese makers and immerse yourself in a blend of tradition and innovation, celebrating craftsmanship, playfulness, and the Year of the Horse. Activities for all ages include ceramic painting, modern paper-cutting, crafting lucky knots, Nüshu calligraphy (a secret script for women), building with bamboo, and painting hairpins and fans. Come to look, experience, taste, and shop unique creations.
newsletter_description: The Wereldmuseum is hosting a Lunar New Year event celebrating the Year of the Horse and Dutch-Chinese craftsmanship. Events are happening all weekend, but for the little ones there is a lantern crafting activity and a chance to make dumplings in the shape of dinosaurs (Sunday only).

title: Family Musical Juf Roos Goes on Holiday
description: Juf Roos is a YouTube hit and one of the most popular youth performances in the Netherlands! Juf Roos and Gijs are returning to the DeLaMar Theater for a new crazy adventure. Juf Roos wants to go on holiday in the Netherlands, but on the way to Aunt Tulp's farm, Gijs finds a lost dog. Whose dog is it? And where is Aunt Tulp? Together with the children and their (grand)parents in the audience, Juf Roos and Gijs will surely bring the adventure to a good end. At 'Juf Roos Goes on Holiday' you can join in by imagining, shouting, and dancing. And of course, all Juf Roos hits from recent years will be played!
newsletter_description: Join Juf Roos and Gijs at the DeLaMar Theater for a heartwarming family musical, 'Juf Roos Goes on Holiday,' designed for children aged 2 and up. This lively performance encourages kids to sing, dance, and help solve a fun mystery, featuring all of Juf Roos's popular hits. Tickets are required.

title: Trampoline Jumping for Little Ones (MINIVROG)
description: Join VROG Urban Movement for a special trampoline session tailored for toddlers aged 2-5 years, known as MINIVROG. This activity allows one parent to jump together with one child in a safe and fun environment, perfect for moving, bouncing, and burning energy. Sessions are held on Saturday and Sunday mornings from 09:30 to 11:30. The price for this experience is €10, which covers one parent and one child. Booking online is required as spaces are limited. The event takes place at VROG Urban Movement, located at Mr. Visserplein 7 in the Amsterdam City Center, near Waterlooplein.
newsletter_description: VROG Urban Movement invites toddlers aged 2-5 and their parents to a fun trampoline jumping session! These 'MINIVROG' sessions, held weekly on Saturday and Sunday mornings, offer a safe way for one parent and one child to bounce and burn energy together. The cost is €10 for a parent and child, and booking online is essential due to limited spaces.
location: Mr. Visserplein 7, 1011 RD Amsterdam, The Netherlands

title: Spring Break Fun at WOPL! - Creative Play World
description: WOPL! - World of Play & Learning is a vibrant creative play world designed for children and adults to play, discover, and learn together. During the upcoming spring break, visitors can enjoy a special 20% discount on tickets by using the code SPRINGBREAK20.
newsletter_description: WOPL! - World of Play & Learning invites families to explore its vibrant creative play world, where children and adults can play, discover, and learn together. Enjoy a special 20% discount on tickets for this engaging activity during the upcoming spring break. Open to all ages, tickets are available with the SPRINGBREAK20 code.

title: Gewoon zoals je bent
description: Klein Amsterdam Producties presents 'Gewoon zoals je bent' (Just the way you are), a musical and visual theater performance for ages 2+. Based on Jonny Lambert's popular picture book, the play takes you into the world of Little Snuf the elephant, who struggles to walk in line due to his curiosity. Repeatedly told 'In line, Little Snuf!', he ultimately embraces being himself, just the way he is. The performance lasts 40 minutes and booking fees apply.
newsletter_description: 'Gewoon zoals je bent' is a musical and visual theater performance that celebrates individuality through the story of a unique little elephant; based on the beloved picture book by Jonny Lambert.
location: Meer en Vaart 300, 1068 LE Amsterdam, The Netherlands

title: 10-Week Workout Mama Program
description: The Workout Lab offers a comprehensive 10-week workout program designed for pregnant women. This program includes weekly 1.5-hour group workout sessions, opportunities to meet other mums-to-be, unlimited Workout Mama & Power classes available at two Amsterdam locations, 5 expert seminars on pregnancy exercise, and an online course covering key pregnancy and exercise topics. Participants receive safe guidance and can work at their own pace. This specific offering is part of a giveaway, where one lucky mama-to-be can win the full program, valued at €449. The giveaway entry period closes on February 13th, 2026.
newsletter_description: The Workout Lab offers a comprehensive 10-Week Workout Mama Program for pregnant women, featuring weekly group sessions, unlimited classes at two Amsterdam locations, expert seminars, and an online course. One lucky mama-to-be can win this valuable €449 program for free by entering a giveaway that closes February 13th.

title: LiCHT
description: Step into an enchanting world where light and movement merge into a spectacle. LiCHT is a dance performance in which a dancer and an aerial acrobat play with reflections, colors, and perspectives. Inspired by the magic of natural light—the glitter of sunbeams on water, a rainbow in the sky—LiCHT takes the audience on a visual journey of discovery. As the performers move through space, both on the floor and high above the stage, an intriguing interplay of shadow, reflection, and illusion unfolds. Using mirrors and reflective materials, a dynamic game of concealing and revealing is created, involving both performers and audience in a special interaction.
newsletter_description: LiCHT is an enchanting dance and aerial acrobatics performance that plays with reflections, colors, and perspectives. This visual journey of discovery unfolds through an intriguing interplay of shadow, mirroring, and illusion, engaging both performers and audience.

title: Free Children's Clothing Giveaway
description: Sharing with Kids hosts a free children's clothing giveaway event, offering pre-loved clothing to support families. Note that the start time has changed to 3:00 PM.
newsletter_description: Join Sharing with Kids for their weekly free children's clothing giveaway, a helping hand for families with young children. Take home pre-loved clothing for your little ones. The event runs from 3:00 PM to 5:00 PM.
location: Louis Couperusstraat 13, 1064 BZ Amsterdam, The Netherlands

title: Blooming Balance Yoga Class - West
description:
Carol from Life in Bloom Yoga will be guiding parents through a nurturing, well-rounded all-levels yoga class that blends flow, stretch, strength, & stillness to support both body & inner life. Created for real bodies in changing seasons, this practice offers space for movement, rest, reflection, & connection just for the adults. No pressure, no judgment. We meet you exactly where you are.

Locations and Dates
- West: Studio da Vasco on Wednesdays Feb 25, Mar 4 & 11 at 10:30-11:30

Details:
- 1 hour session: 45 minutes of connecting with your own body & mind through yoga, 15 minutes of connecting with people going through this same messy adventure (tea & coffee provided)
- All levels welcome (even pregnant)
- Adults only

Practical Tips:
- Wear comfy clothes for movement
- Yoga mats & water are provided, but you are welcome to bring your own
newsletter_description: Life in Bloom Yoga offers a nurturing, all-levels yoga class for adults, including pregnant individuals, blending movement, rest, and reflection. Hosted by Carol, this paid 1-hour session includes 45 minutes of yoga and 15 minutes for connecting with other parents, with tea and coffee provided. No pressure, no judgment, all levels welcome.

title: Everything moves
description: A captivating performance by Viola for 'curious mini-explorers,' exploring balance, sound, and wonder. The show features the manipulation of everyday objects, balancing on rollers, and a journey through movement, equilibrium, and transformation of space. Accompanied by a unique musical universe of percussion, crumpled paper, drums, and electronic sounds, it creates a gentle, visual, and musical experience. Viola, a rola bola specialist, offers a modern reinterpretation of this traditional circus discipline.
newsletter_description: This unique show is a modern reinterpretation of rola bola, a traditional circus discipline. It explores balance, sound, and wonder through the magic of everyday objects in a gentle and inspiring visual and musical journey for ages 0-6.

title: Spicy Margaritas x Mums and Bubs Class
description: Chilis Pilates hosts a special 'Mums and Bubs' class at The Margarita Bar. This event combines a pilates workout where mothers can move with their babies, followed by a social gathering. Participants can unwind with spicy margaritas (alcohol-free options available) and some bites, and socialize with other mums. Mats are provided. More info and booking link available in Chilis Pilates' bio.
newsletter_description: Join Chilis Pilates for a 'Mums and Bubs' class at The Margarita Bar! This special event combines a pilates workout with your baby, followed by an opportunity to socialize with other mothers over spicy margaritas (alcohol-free options available) and bites. Perfect for new parents looking to connect and stay active with their little ones.

title: Foundations of Joy: A Workshop for New Parents
description:
Foundations of Joy - In Motherhood and Beyond
Sign up here for the free Foundations of Joy - In Motherhood and Beyond webinar, in which I'll lay the groundwork to help you figure out how to reconnect with what makes you feel alive while caring for little humans.

Join me live on SUNDAY, MARCH 1, 16:30 - 17:30.

Recording available afterwards
newsletter_description: Together with art therapist Eva you'll lay the groundwork to help you figure out how to reconnect with what makes you feel alive while caring for little humans.

title: Music on Lap Spring Course
description: This is a Spring course for 'Music on Lap' (Muziek op Schoot) by De Muziekzolder, designed for children aged 8 months to 4 years, accompanied by a parent or grandparent. The course offers engaging music and movement sessions. New course tracks start on Mondays, Wednesdays, Fridays, and Saturdays in March. For more information and to register, see the link in bio or comments on the original Instagram post.
newsletter_description: Join De Muziekzolder for their 'Music on Lap' Spring Course, designed for children aged 8 months to 4 years and their parents or grandparents. This course offers engaging music and movement sessions, with new tracks starting weekly on Mondays, Wednesdays, Fridays, and Saturdays. Visit their Instagram for more information and registration.

title: Festive opening of the new insect hotel and flower ribbon
description: This is the festive opening of the new insect hotel and flower ribbon in the Wachterliedplantsoen. Ten young girls from the neighborhood came up with the idea for a flower ribbon and an insect hotel, which won an award from West Begroot. Together with children from the neighborhood, KIEM built the insect hotel, and it will soon be firmly installed. Join us on Thursday, March 5th at 3:00 PM for the festive opening with daily director Esther Fabriek. Attendees will receive free flower seeds and can enjoy tasty food and drinks. Gather in the middle of the Wachterliedplantsoen, by the flyer cabinet and the football field.
newsletter_description: Join KIEM for the festive opening of a new insect hotel and flower ribbon in Wachterliedplantsoen, an initiative by local children! Enjoy free flower seeds, food, and drinks at this community event perfect for all ages.

title: Family Funfair Amsterdam Westerpark
description: The Family Funfair Amsterdam Westerpark, organized by Frans Stuy Event Organization, is advertised as the biggest and most affordable funfair in Amsterdam. It offers various attractions and entertainment for families to enjoy.
newsletter_description: Frans Stuy Event Organization presents the Family Funfair at Westerpark, touted as the biggest and most affordable funfair in Amsterdam. This event promises a wide range of attractions and entertainment, making it perfect for families and visitors of all ages.

title: The Calm & Confident Mama: 4-Week Hypnobirthing & Antenatal Course
description: The Calm & Confident Mama is a 4-week live hypnobirthing and antenatal course from Krish Yoga, combining certified KGHypnobirthing techniques with prenatal yoga. This hybrid course, offered online and in-person in Amsterdam, teaches evidence-based breathing, relaxation, and birth preparation methods. It aims to help expectant parents feel calm, confident, and in control during labour, regardless of birth plan (home birth, hospital birth, or caesarean). The course includes 4 live 3-hour sessions, pre-recorded practices, the complete KGHypnobirthing Course by Katherine Graves, 12 months access, and a private community. Limited to 12 couples per cohort.
newsletter_description: Join Krish Yoga's 'Calm & Confident Mama' 4-week hypnobirthing and antenatal course for expectant parents and their birth partners. This hybrid course, available online and in-person in Amsterdam, costs €345 and combines KGHypnobirthing techniques with prenatal yoga to help you prepare for a calm, confident, and empowering birth experience.

title: Motherhood and Me: A supportive creative workshop to reconnect with yourself
description: Motherhood asks a lot of all of us. This gentle but insightful, reflective art-based workshop is designed to help mothers reconnect with themselves, with curiosity, compassion, and honesty. Led by psychologist and trained art therapy facilitator (and mom of two) Eva Simona Kulenovic, this workshop offers a space to explore what it feels like to be a mom right now, what you're enjoying and what feels heavy, how you're connecting with your children and yourself, what you long to make more space for, and how motherhood has changed you. Through simple guided art-making (including drawing, clay modeling, and writing – no creative experience or talent needed!), you'll give shape to what you feel, see what truly matters, and return home with greater clarity, acceptance, and empowerment. The workshop costs €55 per person (€50 if you bring a friend) and includes all materials, cookies, and tea.
newsletter_description: The Joy Embassy, led by psychologist Eva Simona Kulenovic, invites mothers to a supportive creative workshop to reconnect with themselves. This reflective art-based session helps moms explore their experiences, needs, and desires through gentle guided art-making. The workshop costs €55 per person and is designed for mothers at any stage, no creative experience necessary.

title: Exercise Workshop
description: Come move your body at Papote! A drink is included in the ticket. You may bring your little one(s). All levels welcome
newsletter_description: Papote and MoveNMeet are hosting an exercise workshop where children are encouraged! A drink is included in the ticket. All levels welcome.

title: Baby Morning
description: A special baby morning at WOPL! for babies under 12 months and their parents or guardians. Participants can enjoy various activities and workshops. The baby mornings are free of charge.
newsletter_description: WOPL! hosts a special Baby Morning every Monday, offering engaging activities and workshops for babies under 12 months and their parents. These baby mornings are free of charge, providing a wonderful opportunity to connect and play.
location: Bos en Lommerplein 280, Amsterdam, The Netherlands

title: KIEM Workshop: Crafting Flowers for Mom
description: A creative workshop hosted by KIEM where children can craft beautiful flowers for their mothers. This event encourages young ones to express their creativity and make a special gift.
newsletter_description: Join KIEM for a delightful workshop where children can craft beautiful flowers to surprise their mothers.

title: Vondeltuin Puppet Show
description: Experience a delightful puppet show at Vondeltuin, presented by Erik van Ophem and featuring the beloved Jan Klaassen & Katrijn. These monthly performances, held on Wednesday afternoons, offer free entry for children and their families. The show begins at 15:30 and promises engaging storytelling and entertainment for young audiences.
newsletter_description: Vondeltuin hosts a free monthly puppet show for children 2+ years, featuring Erik van Ophem and the beloved Jan Klaassen & Katrijn. These engaging shows provide entertainment for young families in a welcoming atmosphere. No registration needed, just drop by and join in!

title: Play Share Swap & Recycle Festival
description: The Play Share Swap & Recycle Festival is an event where families can bring their outgrown toys and children's clothing to swap for 'new' treasures, promoting a sustainable swap economy. The event features super cool recycle workshops, including a plastic shredder in collaboration with Eco.Dam. While free tickets are available, families can also purchase support tickets to help sustain and grow this initiative.
newsletter_description: Join Motherhood.Amsterdam for their Play Share Swap & Recycle Festival at De Hallen, where families can bring outgrown toys and children's clothing to swap for 'new' treasures. This event promotes a sustainable swap economy and includes engaging recycle workshops with Eco.Dam. Free tickets are available, with an option to purchase support tickets, making it a perfect outing for families with young children.
location: Hannie Dankbaarpassage 33, 1053 RT Amsterdam, The Netherlands

title: Mama Mingle: Holistic Sleep Support
description: Join a cozy Expert-led Mama Mingle focused on holistic sleep support for families. Hosted by Julia, a certified holistic sleep coach and founder of Tales of Sleep, this session explores real-life sleep challenges with a gentle, whole-picture, and evidence-based approach that never involves leaving children to cry or forcing methods that don't feel right. Expect a relaxed, informal space for honest conversation, expert-led Q&A, and shared experiences, offering fresh perspectives and practical takeaways for mothers seeking better sleep without compromising connection for their children aged 0-6 years.
newsletter_description: Seeking gentle and effective sleep solutions for your family? Join Julia from Tales of Sleep for an expert-led Mama Mingle by MamaSocial focused on holistic sleep support. It's a zero-judgment space for parents with children aged 0-6 years to discuss sleep challenges, gain insights, and find practical, connection-focused strategies.

title: Children's Clothing & Toy Fair
description: Discover a wide selection of secondhand children's clothing (sizes 80-176) and toys at this bustling fair. Sellers can set their own prices, drop off items the day before, and receive 85% of the selling price. The event promises a lively atmosphere with tasty food. Please note that only digital payments are accepted; no cash.
newsletter_description: Join Kledingbeurs WGM for a vibrant secondhand children's clothing and toy fair at Frankendaelschool. Discover a wide array of items for children from babies to teenagers (sizes 80-176) and enjoy a lively atmosphere with food.

title: My Colors
description: My Colors is a colorful, physical, imaginative performance featuring puppetry, animations, music, illusions, and a dose of humor, presented by Mime Wave.
newsletter_description: Mime Wave presents 'My Colors,' a vibrant and imaginative performance featuring puppetry, animations, music, and illusions. Designed for children aged 2 to 7 years, this unique show promises a delightful experience filled with humor and physical theatre.

title: Saint Patrick's Day Party!
description: Join Robbeburg Playgroup for a festive Saint Patrick's Day Party! Expect a morning filled with themed activities, games, and fun for babies, toddlers, and preschoolers. This special event is a great opportunity for little ones to celebrate the holiday in a playful and engaging environment. Valid members can use coupon code MEMBER10 for a discount.
newsletter_description: Celebrate Saint Patrick's Day with Robbeburg Playgroup! This festive party offers a morning of themed activities, games, and fun tailored for babies, toddlers, and preschoolers (0-5 years). Join Robbeburg for a playful and engaging celebration.

title: Bollywood Evening: Rab Ne Bani Di Jodi
description: Come and shine at our Bollywood evening and let yourself be enchanted! Leave the daily grind behind and step into a world full of intrigue, love, music, dance, and big dreams. A world where everything is just a little bit more magical than in real life. Preceding the film, Vyjayanti Iyer will give a Bollywood dance workshop. Wear your most comfortable and colorful clothing for optimal pleasure.
organization: FilmFestival De Pijp and CC Amstel
newsletter_description: FilmFestival De Pijp and CC Amstel invite parents and adults to an enchanting Bollywood evening featuring the film 'Rab Ne Bani Di Jodi.' Prepare to be swept away by a world of music and dance, starting with a special Bollywood dance workshop by Vyjayanti Iyer. Tickets are €6.
location: CC Amstel, Cullinanplein 1, 1074 JN Amsterdam, The Netherlands

title: Babywearing Dance Class
description: Come move your body, connect with your little one, and have fun. No experience is necessary, just movement, joy, and oxytocin to fun world rhythms and groovy beats. The instructor is a certified babywearing consultant and will provide free fit-checks for everyone who arrives on time (from 9:45). Please note there is no space for strollers as you need to climb steep stairs to the first floor, so bringing a baby carrier is recommended. Babies of all ages and toddlers are welcome; you can wear them, hold them in-arms, or let them crawl on mats. All parents and caregivers are welcome. The class costs 15 euros, with a sliding scale option available by emailing adapt2love@gmail.com.
newsletter_description: Join Adapting to Love for a Babywearing Dance Class, where you can move your body and connect with your little one to fun world rhythms. A certified babywearing consultant will provide free fit-checks before class. All parents/caregivers are welcome with babies and toddlers of all ages. The class costs 15 euros, with a sliding scale option available.
location: Hendrik Jacobszstraat 12, 1075 PD Amsterdam, The Netherlands

title: Rembrandtpark Cleanup Day
description: Do you also want a clean Rembrandtpark? Then come and help clean up cheerfully on Saturday, March 21! Gather at 10:30 AM at 't Landje, Staalmeesterslaan 197A. Coffee, tea, and lunch will be provided. If you want to be sure of lunch, please arrive between 10:30 AM and 10:45 AM. Wear suitable work clothing, work shoes, and gloves; litter pickers and garbage bags will be supplied by the organizers. See you there!
newsletter_description: Help keep Rembrandtpark beautiful and clean by joining the Rembrandtpark Cleanup Day! Hosted by Stichting Vrienden van het Rembrandtpark (Friends of the Rembrandtpark Foundation), this free event provides coffee, tea, and lunch, along with all necessary cleanup tools. It's a great opportunity for community members of all ages to contribute to their local park.

title: Sugar Feast Celebration
description: A warm welcome to celebrate the Sugar Feast (Eid al-Fitr) together with Moedernetwerk. Attendees are encouraged to bring something tasty to share. The event will also feature beautiful henna application. Registration is required in advance, as space is limited.
newsletter_description: Join Moedernetwerk for a festive Sugar Feast (Eid al-Fitr) celebration, open to families of all ages! Attendees are invited to bring tasty dishes to share, and beautiful henna will also be available. The event is free, but registration is required due to limited capacity.

title: Baby & Toddler sleep: expert answers to your biggest challenges
description: Join Parentally for a live online Q&A session with a sleep expert from How About Sleep, who will provide answers to your biggest challenges regarding baby and toddler sleep. This session is designed for parents seeking expert advice and support for their little ones.
newsletter_description: Parentally invites parents of babies and toddlers to a live online Q&A session on Instagram where sleep expert Petra from How About Sleep will address your biggest sleep challenges.

title: MoveNMeet Parent & Child Class
description:
Every Wednesday morning, Movenmeet organizes parent & child workouts at Broedplaats SUP (Amsterdam South).

Participation is free of charge. Please register in advance; walk-ins are also welcome.

When: Every Wednesday morning 10:00-10:50 (walk-in from 9:30 for coffee, games, and a chat)
Where: Broedplaats SUP, Surinameplein 33, Amsterdam
For whom: Parents (m/x/f) with child(ren) aged 0-5 years.

What to bring: Yourself and your little one(s)

We advise wearing comfortable clothing.

Follow @movenmeet on Instagram for the latest updates.
newsletter_description:
Every Wednesday morning, Movenmeet organizes parent & child workouts at Broedplaats SUP (Amsterdam South).

Participation is free of charge. Please register in advance; walk-ins are also welcome.
